flare.banner: Flare mode — we're keeping it light. Your streak is protected.
flare.sectionBody: During a flare, the app lightens logging and protects your streak. Turn it on whenever you need it.

home.noNormalYet: Keep documenting to establish your normal
home.scoreEmpty: Not enough data yet for the chart
home.recentEmpty: Your first entries will show up here. Tap “+” to start.

streak.body: Your record grows with every day you note. A single action is enough.
streak.zero: Log an entry today to start your streak.
streak.frozen: Your streak is protected during your flare. ❄️
streak.graceAvailable: Missing one day this week won't break your streak.
streak.graceUsed: You've already caught up one day this week.

notifications.masterHint: Two per day at most. Everything is opt-in.
notifications.eveningHint: A gentle nudge if your day is empty.
notifications.unsupported: Reminders are not available on the web.
notifications.treatmentHint: The day before and the day of the due date.

too_long.title: Just one thing
too_long.body: One tap is enough: note only the essential.

anxious.title: At your own pace
anxious.body: If you feel like it, a word about your day. Otherwise, all good.

doctor.title: For your next appointment
doctor.body: A few seconds today enrich your record.

weekly.title: Your week is ready
weekly.body: Your recap is waiting in Trends.

treatment.title: Treatment
treatment.body: Time for your biologic. Injection done?

settings.title: Settings
settings.restoreConfirmBody: Your current data will be replaced by the file's contents. This cannot be undone.
settings.privacyBody: Your entries stay on your device. Only the photos and notes you choose to analyze are sent, for the duration of the analysis, to our AI service — which does not store them. Your data and its export will stay free forever.
settings.disclaimer: Crohnicle is a personal tracking tool, not a medical device.
